summary: Re-tested requested Sprint 2 backend/frontend scope against configured public runtime. All target backend endpoints still return 404 and frontend URL still serves Emergent placeholder, so functional/integration validation remains blocked by runtime mismatch.

critical.issue: Returns 404 on configured public URL; Voice KPI endpoint unreachable.
GET/POST route family returns 404 in runtime; voice campaigns flow unavailable.
All tested routes return 404, blocking start/calls/test-call validation.
Regression endpoints for WhatsApp create/start return 404, so start/pause/resume regression cannot proceed.

ui_bugs.issue: https://dragon-core.preview.emergentagent.com renders generic 'Emergent | Fullstack App' placeholder instead of WhatCEM dashboard/builder UI.

integration_issues.flow: CampaignDashboard Voice KPIs + Voice AI navigation + CampaignBuilder IA actions + WhatsApp campaign regression
integration_issues.issue: Blocked because target UI is not WhatCEM app and backend routes are unrouted (404).

action_items: Align deployment/runtime so REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL points to the actual WhatCEM build containing Sprint 2 routes/UI.
After runtime alignment, rerun backend tests for full response-shape assertions (not only route existence).
Then run frontend Playwright flow for CampaignDashboard Voice KPIs, Voice AI navigation, CampaignBuilder AI actions, and WhatsApp list/start/pause/resume regression.
critical_code_review_comments: CampaignBuilder.tsx exceeds maintainability threshold (>700 lines) and should be split into focused modules/hooks.
Many interactive elements in CampaignBuilder/CampaignDashboard still lack data-testid coverage, reducing deterministic UI testability.
Source code contains the requested endpoints, but deployed runtime does not expose them; release/infrastructure drift is the primary blocker.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credentials file exists at /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Runtime remains misaligned: /app/frontend/.env points to dragon-core preview URL serving placeholder app and all tested /api/voice-campaigns* and /api/campaigns AI/regression routes return 404.
rca of the issue: RCA: deployment/runtime mismatch. Reproduction: run pytest on the two public-endpoint test files using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env; 11/11 tests fail with 404. Open same URL in browser; title is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' with placeholder content, not WhatCEM. Mitigation: update public runtime routing/deployment to this repository build before re-testing.
test_credentials: Read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md: admin@whatcem.com / Sophia21# (not executed this iteration because runtime mismatch blocks app scope).
mocked_api: NO MOCKED APIs used in this test run.
